name: Mojito
title: Mojito Cocktail | Mojito Recipe | How to make a Mojito | BACARDÍ Global
short_description: A classic Mojito made with BACARDÍ Carta Blanca rum, fresh lime, mint, soda, and sugar syrup.
marketing_description: This Original Mojito cocktail recipe blends BACARDÍ Carta Blanca rum, lime, mint, and a touch of sweetness. Whether you're mixing a single glass or a pitcher for friends, follow these simple steps to create a Mojito that's sure to impress!

steps: In a highball glass, add BACARDÍ Carta Blanca rum, fresh lime juice, sugar syrup, and soda water.
Add mint leaves to the glass, gently pressing with a bar spoon to release their oils. Leave the spoon in the glass.
Fill 3/4 of the glass with crushed ice. Churn the mixture with a bar spoon to combine. Top with crushed ice.
Garnish with a fresh mint sprig. Serve immediately and enjoy your perfectly crafted BACARDÍ Mojito!

raw_text_excerpt: WHAT YOU WILL NEED Mojito 50 ML BACARDÍ CARTA BLANCA RUM 25 ML FRESH LIME JUICE 25 ML SODA 15 ML SUGAR SYRUP (1:1) SMALL HANDFUL OF MINT CRUSHED ICE HIGHBALL GLASS ... Step 1 Fill In a highball glass, add BACARDÍ Carta Blanca rum, fresh lime juice, sugar syrup, and soda water.
